title: Don Giovanni
descriptionEN: Based on the legends of Don Juan, a fictional libertine and seducer, blending comedy, melodrama and supernatural elements.

title: The Magic Flute
descriptionEN: A fairy tale story with Masonic elements, following Prince Tamino's quest to rescue Pamina.

title: The Marriage of Figaro
descriptionEN: A continuation of The Barber of Seville, detailing a single 'day of madness' in the palace of Count Almaviva.

title: La Bohème
descriptionEN: The tragic love story of the poet Rodolfo and the seamstress Mimì in 1840s Paris.

title: Tosca
descriptionEN: A story of love, lust, murder, and political intrigue set in Rome during the Napoleonic wars.

title: Turandot
descriptionEN: Prince Calaf falls in love with the cold Princess Turandot, who requires her suitors to answer three riddles.

title: Madama Butterfly
descriptionEN: The heartbreaking story of a trusting Japanese geisha and her disastrous marriage to an American naval officer.

title: La Traviata
descriptionEN: The tragic romance between the courtesan Violetta Valéry and the young bourgeois Alfredo Germont.

title: Rigoletto
descriptionEN: A cursed court jester tries to protect his daughter from the licentious Duke of Mantua.

title: Aida
descriptionEN: An Ethiopian princess held captive in Egypt falls in love with an Egyptian military commander.

title: Nabucco
descriptionEN: Follows the plight of the Jews as they are assaulted, conquered, and exiled by the Babylonian King Nebuchadnezzar.

title: Carmen
descriptionEN: The tragic tale of a naive soldier who is seduced by the fiery gypsy Carmen.

title: The Barber of Seville
descriptionEN: Count Almaviva enlists the help of Figaro, the local barber, to woo the beautiful Rosina.

title: Norma
descriptionEN: A Druid high priestess betrays her people for a Roman proconsul, who then leaves her for another woman.

title: Lucia di Lammermoor
descriptionEN: Caught in a feud between her family and the man she loves, Lucia is driven to madness.

title: Fidelio
descriptionEN: Leonore disguises herself as a male prison guard to rescue her husband from a political prison.

title: Tristan und Isolde
descriptionEN: A tale of doomed love based on medieval romance, noted for its revolutionary use of chromaticism.

title: Die Walküre
descriptionEN: The second part of the Ring cycle, featuring the famous 'Ride of the Valkyries'.

title: Parsifal
descriptionEN: Based on the Arthurian knight Parzival and his quest for the Holy Grail.

title: Lohengrin
descriptionEN: A mysterious knight arrives in a swan-drawn boat to defend a wrongfully accused noblewoman.
